title: stephanotis suaveolens
intro: Stephanotis suaveolens, also known as Madagascan honeysuckle or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering evergreen vine native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even help to lower blood pressure. Stephanotis suaveolens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
